title: Omar and Us
overview: Ismet is a Turkish soldier, who was on duty at the border as a Commander of the Coast Guard and recently got retired. Now as a civilian, he struggles to communicate with his family and people surrounding him. His only son abandoned him and left to the U.S.

trailers.title: Official Teaser
trailers.channel_name: Maryna Er Gorbach & Mehmet Bahadir Er
